products.name: The Complete Sherlock Holmes
products.blurb: All 9 Sherlock Holmes books in one beautifully formatted EPUB - 4 novels and 5 story collections.

products.name: Human Body Word Search
products.blurb: 20 word search puzzles organized into 7 body-system chapters (skeletal, muscular, circulatory, nervous & senses, respiratory, digestive & excretory, immune/skin/endocrine), 15x15 grids.

products.name: A4 Daily & Weekly Duo — Undated Printable Planner Set
products.blurb: Undated daily + weekly planner combo, sized for A4 — the first Grid & Ledger set built for the international paper standard instead of US Letter.

products.name: Daily Focus Planner — Undated Printable, 31 Days
products.blurb: Undated daily planner, US Letter, 35 pages — 31 daily pages plus 4 Weekly Review pages.

products.name: Fitness & Workout Log — 12-Week Undated Training Journal
products.blurb: Undated 12-week workout log, US Letter, 100 pages — a daily sets/reps/weight grid with warmup, cardio, RPE and mobility tracking, 12 weekly summaries…

products.name: Focus Productivity Bundle — 4 Undated Printables in One
products.blurb: All four Grid & Ledger core planners in one 116-page print-ready PDF: Daily Focus Planner, Weekly Focus Planner, Monthly Habit Tracker, and Monthly Budget Planner. Undated, US Letter, print at home.

products.name: Monthly Habit Tracker — Undated Printable, 12 Months
products.blurb: Undated habit tracker, US Letter, 12 pages — one month per page. 12 habit rows against day-of-month columns, plus a monthly reflection prompt. Print at home, start any month.

products.name: Project & Goal Planner — 90-Day Quarterly System
products.blurb: Undated 90-day goal planner, US Letter, 16 pages — one Main Goal broken into 3 Key Results, mapped across a 13-week Quarter Map, then worked one Weekly Action Grid at a time.

products.name: Weekly Meal Planner & Grocery List — Undated Printable, 52 Weeks
products.blurb: Undated weekly meal planner, US Letter, 52 two-page spreads — a 7-day x 4-meal planning grid on the left, a categorized tear-out grocery checklist on the right.

products.name: Essential UI Icons - 40 Clean Line Icons (SVG + PNG)
products.blurb: Forty consistent 24px line icons - arrows, chevrons, controls, status, and everyday interface glyphs - as restyleable SVGs with PNG previews and a contact sheet.

products.name: Monthly Budget Tracker
products.blurb: A real .xlsx budget workbook with Income, Expense (budgeted vs. actual)…

products.name: Graded Fields - 12 Verified-Seamless fBm Textures (256-1536px)
products.blurb: Every tile in this pack is seamless by mathematical construction, not by hand-touching: the engine builds each pattern from integer-cycle Fourier components…

products.name: Neon Runner — Chase & Boss Chiptune Pack (9 Loops + 16 SFX)
products.blurb: Nine A-minor chiptune loops in one intensity ladder plus sixteen one-shot SFX — 25 WAV files covering a runner's states from menu to boss.

products.name: The Practical Houseplant Handbook: Watering, Light, Soil, and Troubleshooting
products.blurb: Houseplant care by the specific problem, not generic tips: the finger test for watering, the shadow test for light, and how to tell root rot, spider mites, mealybugs…

products.name: Emotionally Load-Bearing — Hand-Lettered Crayon Print
products.blurb: Chunky hand-lettered crayon caption for the person who holds everything together: 15x18in / 300dpi transparent print PNG, plus a tee mockup and a 1:1 texture detail crop.
